GameID.description: The unique ID of the game associated with this quarter

Number.description: The Number (Order) of the Quarter in the scope of the Game.

Name.description: The Name of the Quarter (possible values: 1, 2, 3, 4, OT, OT2, OT3, etc)

AwayScore.description: The total points scored by the away team in the given period only

HomeScore.description: The total points scored by the home team in the given period only
